Package io.vertigo.account.plugins.account.store.loader

Class LoaderAccountStorePlugin

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.account.plugins.account.store.loader.LoaderAccountStorePlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
AccountStorePlugin, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable, io.vertigo.core.node.component.CoreComponent, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Plugin
public final class LoaderAccountStorePlugin extends Object implements AccountStorePlugin, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable
Specific account store, use to redirect loading to a applicative component.
Author:
npiedeloup
